title: Soul Sight
description: Use soul torches to find each other.
body:
While a player holds a soul torch (in main or offhand), particles will point them in the direction of any other player also holding a soul torch, at any distance.

Part of the [✨Comfy Improvements](https://modrinth.com/collection/6YtxmFXB) series. Inclusion in modpacks is encouraged.
